# Integration-specific page

## When to use

Use when product connects to known tools.

## Why it works

Tool-stack intent is concrete.

## Mechanism

Buyers searching integrations often have active workflow pain.

## Required inputs

Integration demo, setup steps, screenshots.

## When not to use

If integration is not live.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Integration page visits, setup starts, activation.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
